title: Urostachys subulifolius
taxonomy: Urostachys subulifolius is a species of plant in the family Lomandraceae. It is classified as a type of restio, which is a type of succulent plant. The plant is native to South Africa, where it grows in sandy coastal areas. The classification of Urostachys subulifolius places it within the monocot order Liliales, and it is often found in the same ecosystem as other succulent species. Further classification details of Urostachys subulifolius are still being researched and confirmed by botanists.
